scripts.workspace:test: node --test tests/guards/config-typescript.test.mjs tests/guards/config-quality.test.mjs tests/guards/workspace-layout.test.mjs tests/guards/packages-consumers.test.mjs tests/guards/ios-scope.test.mjs tests/guards/workspace-workflows.test.mjs
scripts.ios:test: cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project FamilyEvents.xcodeproj -scheme FamilyEvents -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 15' test
scripts.db:types: bash scripts/supabase.sh gen types typescript --local --schema public > apps/web/src/lib/database.types.ts
